sentences.target: El tren llega a las ocho.

translations.es: El tren llega a las ocho.
translations.fr: Le train arrive à huit heures.
translations.de: Der Zug kommt um acht Uhr an.
translations.pt: O trem chega às oito horas.
translations.nl: De trein komt om acht uur aan.

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular, introducing the noun phrase.
Common noun, singular masculine noun functioning as the subject nucleus.
Main verb, present indicative, third person singular.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement.
Definite article, feminine plural, agreeing with the following noun phrase.
Cardinal numeral used as part of the time expression.

sentences.target: Subo al tren con mi hermano.

translations.es: Subo al tren con mi hermano.
translations.en: I get on the train with my brother.
translations.fr: Je monte dans le train avec mon frère.
translations.de: Ich steige mit meinem Bruder in den Zug ein.
translations.it: Salgo sul treno con mio fratello.
translations.ru: Я сажусь в поезд с братом.
translations.pt: Eu entro no trem com meu irmão.
translations.vi: Tôi lên tàu cùng anh trai tôi.
translations.nl: Ik stap met mijn broer in de trein.
translations.uk: Я сідаю на поїзд із братом.
translations.hu: A testvéremmel szállok fel a vonatra.
translations.hi: मैं अपने भाई के साथ ट्रेन में चढ़ता हूँ।
translations.pl: Wsiadam do pociągu z moim bratem.
translations.el: Μπαίνω στο τρένο με τον αδερφό μου.
translations.nb: Jeg går på toget med broren min.
translations.id: Saya naik kereta bersama saudara laki-laki saya.
translations.sv: Jag går på tåget med min bror.
translations.ro: Urc în tren cu fratele meu.
translations.da: Jeg stiger på toget med min bror.
translations.ja: 私は兄と電車に乗ります。

tokens.surface_en: I go up / I get on
tokens.explanation: Main verb, present indicative, first person singular.
Contracted preposition formed from 'a' + masculine singular article 'el', introducing the destination.
Common noun, singular masculine noun governed by the preposition.
Preposition introducing a comitative phrase.
Possessive determiner, invariable, modifying the noun.
Common noun, singular masculine noun functioning as the complement of the possessive.

sentences.target: Espero el tren en la estación.

translations.es: Espero el tren en la estación.
translations.en: I wait for the train at the station.
translations.fr: J'attends le train à la gare.
translations.de: Ich warte am Bahnhof auf den Zug.
translations.pt: Eu espero o trem na estação.
translations.nl: Ik wacht op de trein op het station.
translations.uk: Я чекаю на поїзд на вокзалі.
translations.hi: मैं स्टेशन पर ट्रेन का इंतज़ार कर रहा हूँ।
translations.nb: Jeg venter på toget på stasjonen.
translations.sv: Jag väntar på tåget på stationen.
translations.da: Jeg venter på toget på stationen.
translations.ja: 私は駅で電車を待っています。

tokens.explanation: Main verb, present indicative, first person singular.
Definite article, masculine singular, introducing the noun phrase.
Common noun, singular masculine noun functioning as the direct object.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article, feminine singular, agreeing with the following noun.
Common noun, singular feminine noun functioning as the object of the preposition.

sentences.target: Mi tren va muy rápido hoy.

translations.es: Mi tren va muy rápido hoy.
translations.en: My train is going very fast today.
translations.fr: Mon train va très vite aujourd'hui.
translations.de: Mein Zug fährt heute sehr schnell.
translations.it: Il mio treno va molto veloce oggi.
translations.ko: 내 기차는 오늘 아주 빨리 갑니다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的火车今天开得很快。
translations.yue: 我架火車今日行得好快。
translations.ru: Мой поезд сегодня идёт очень быстро.
translations.pt: Meu trem está indo muito rápido hoje.
translations.he: הרכבת שלי נוסעת היום מאוד מהר.
translations.vi: Tàu của tôi hôm nay chạy rất nhanh.
translations.nl: Mijn trein gaat vandaag heel snel.
translations.uk: Мій поїзд сьогодні їде дуже швидко.
translations.hu: A vonatom ma nagyon gyorsan megy.
translations.hi: मेरी ट्रेन आज बहुत तेज़ जा रही है।
translations.pl: Mój pociąg jedzie dziś bardzo szybko.
translations.el: Το τρένο μου πηγαίνει πολύ γρήγορα σήμερα.
translations.nb: Toget mitt går veldig fort i dag.
translations.id: Kereta saya melaju sangat cepat hari ini.
translations.sv: Mitt tåg går väldigt fort i dag.
translations.ro: Trenul meu merge foarte repede astăzi.
translations.cs: Můj vlak jede dnes velmi rychle.
translations.da: Mit tog kører meget hurtigt i dag.
translations.fi: Junani kulkee اليوم very fast today.
translations.ja: 私の電車は今日はとても速いです。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, invariable, modifying the noun.
Common noun, singular masculine noun functioning as the subject.

Degree adverb modifying the following adjective/adverb.
Adverbial use describing the manner of the verb.
